Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Request Input A description of a loan application process with two types of constraints Part 1 Normative Process Behavior Strict Rules Must be followed Violations are errors Part 2 Desiderata Recommended Best Practices Should be followed but are not strict Violations are suboptimal but acceptable Event Log A table showing three cases Case 1 Case 2 Case 3 with timestamps and activities Task Identify normative violations strict rules and explain why Identify desiderata violations recommendations and explain why noting they are suboptimal Suggest interpretations justifications for the observed behaviors

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze the Normative Rules Strict Sequence Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant Conditional Close Case Condition If Approved Finalize Documentation Close Case If Rejected Close Case NO Finalize Documentation Ordering Credit Check before Risk Assessment Risk Assessment before Loan Decision Loan Decision before Inform Applicant Approved Finalize Documentation before Close Case Rejected NOT Finalize Documentation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze the Desiderata Recommendations Credit Check within 24 hours of Application Received Inform Applicant within 48 hours of Loan Decision Perform Follow up Call before Close Case encouraged

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Analyze Case 1 Flow App Received 0900 Credit Check 0930 Risk Assessment 1000 Loan Decision Approved 1100 Inform Applicant 1300 Finalize Documentation 1330 Close Case 1400 Normative Check Sequence correct Yes Credit Check before Risk Assessment Yes Risk Assessment before Decision Yes Inform after Decision Yes Approved path Yes Finalize Doc Close Verdict Compliant Desiderata Check Credit Check time 0900 to 0930 30 mins less than 24 hrs OK Inform time 1100 to 1300 2 hrs less than 48 hrs OK Follow up Call Not listed in log Verdict Minor desiderata violation Missing Follow up Call

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Analyze Case 2 Flow App Received 0800 Risk Assessment 0820 Credit Check 0900 Loan Decision Rejected 0930 Finalize Documentation 1000 Close Case 1030 Normative Check Sequence Risk Assessment happened before Credit Check Violation Decision Rejected Action after Rejection Finalize Documentation occurred Violation Should not finalize if rejected Verdict Multiple strict violations Desiderata Check Credit Check time 0800 to 0900 1 hr less than 24 hrs OK Inform Applicant Missing The log shows Loan Decision then Finalize Documentation It does not show Inform Applicant Normative Violation Note Inform Applicant must occur after Loan Decision Case 2 skips Inform Applicant This is a strict sequence violation Normative violations take precedence but missing Inform Applicant is also strict

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Analyze Case 3 Flow App Received Jan 10 0900 Credit Check Jan 14 1000 Risk Assessment Jan 14 1100 Loan Decision Approved Jan 14 1200 Inform Applicant Jan 16 1500 Finalize Documentation Jan 17 0900 Close Case Jan 17 1000 Normative Check Sequence correct Yes Credit Check before Risk Assessment Yes Risk Assessment before Decision Yes Inform after Decision Yes Approved path Yes Finalize Doc Close Verdict Compliant with strict rules Desiderata Check Credit Check time Jan 10 0900 to Jan 14 1000 about 97 hours Violation greater than 24 hours Inform time Jan 14 1200 to Jan 16 1500 about 51 hours Violation greater than 48 hours Follow up Call explicitly noted as No Follow up Call Violation Recommendation Verdict Compliant with strict rules but multiple desiderata violations

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Drafting the Response Task 1 Normative Violations Focus on Case 2 Mention Case 2 order swap Risk versus Credit and the Rejected plus Finalize Documentation issue Also check if Case 2 missed Inform Applicant Looking closely at Case 2 log Loan Decision Rejected then Finalize Documentation There is no Inform Applicant activity The rules say Following the loan decision the applicant must be informed of the outcome So Case 2 has three normative violations Task 2 Desiderata Violations Focus on Case 1 Missing Call and Case 3 Timing plus Missing Call Explain that these are soft constraints Task 3 Interpretations Why did Case 2 happen System error rushed process Why did Case 3 happen Backlog weekends manual delays Why Case 1 missing call Oversight automated process

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Refining the Analysis Self Correction Double Check Case 2 Normative 1 Risk Assessment before Credit Check Strict Rule Credit Check must occur before Risk Assessment 2 Finalize Documentation after Rejection Strict Rule If rejected do not finalize 3 Missing Inform Applicant Strict Rule Following loan decision applicant must be informed Case 3 Desiderata 1 Credit Check greater than 24h 2 Inform Applicant greater than 48h 3 No Follow up Call Case 1 Desiderata 1 No Follow up Call

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Final Polish Ensure clear headings bullet points for readability and a professional tone Make sure to explicitly distinguish between Violations Normative and Suboptimal Behavior Desiderata Self Correction on Case 3 Inform Applicant Loan Decision Jan 14 1200 Inform Applicant Jan 16 1500 Difference 48 hours plus 3 hours So 51 hours Yes greater than 48 hours Self Correction on Case 3 Credit Check App Jan 10 0900 CC Jan 14 1000 Difference 4 days plus 1 hour Definitely greater than 24 hours Note on Case 1 The prompt asks to identify cases failing desiderata Case 1 is normatively perfect It only fails the Follow up Call recommendation I should include it there Note on Case 2 Case 2 is a mess normatively I need to be clear that normative violations override desiderata analysis for that case but I should still note if it met the timing it did meet the 24h credit check timing but the order was wrong
